creator: Lars_Koeller@odie.physik2.uni-rostock.de
text:
The -cli switch description says:

		...
		right of the containing switch statement.  -cli0 -.5
                causes case labels to be indented half a tab stop.  The
		...

	it should be

		...
		right of the containing switch statement.  -cli0.5
                causes case labels to be indented half a tab stop.  The
		...

How-To-Repeat: 
	man indent
